# Sentinelone Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — SentinelOne endpoint (agent) inventory tool (read-only).

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `s1_endpoints` | Read-only SentinelOne agents: list/get endpoints, agent activities, groups, sites. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `sentinelone:read` | — | — |
| `s1_management` | Approval-gated SentinelOne response: isolate/reconnect/scan agents, mitigate threats, set verdict, notes, hash blocklist. | `sentinelone:write` | ✓ | — |
| `s1_threats` | Read-only SentinelOne threats: list/get detections, analyst notes, hash blocklist. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `sentinelone:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "console_url": "",
  "api_token": ""
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_token": "",
  "api_version": "v2.1",
  "console_url": "",
  "default_site_ids": "",
  "timeout": 30,
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_token` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | SentinelOne API token (sensitive). |
| `api_version` | `string` | — | — | `"v2.1"` | API path version (default 'v2.1'). |
| `console_url` | `string` | ✓ | — | `""` | SentinelOne console base URL, e.g. 'https://usea1-partners.sentinelone.net'. |
| `default_site_ids` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Optional comma-separated site IDs used to scope list / blocklist calls when the caller omits 'site_ids'. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Validate the TLS certificate (default true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__API_TOKEN` | `api_token` | `string` | `""` | — | SentinelOne API token (sensitive). |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__API_VERSION` | `api_version` | `string` | `"v2.1"` | — | API path version (default 'v2.1'). |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__CONSOLE_URL` | `console_url` | `string` | `""` | — | SentinelOne console base URL, e.g. 'https://usea1-partners.sentinelone.net'. |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__DEFAULT_SITE_IDS` | `default_site_ids` | `string` | `""` | — | Optional comma-separated site IDs used to scope list / blocklist calls when the caller omits 'site_ids'. |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | Per-request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `TOOL_SENTINELONE__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Validate the TLS certificate (default true). |
| `TOOL_S1_MANAGEMENT__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `s1_endpoints`

- **`agent_activities`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `agent_id` | `string` | — | [get_agent, agent_activities] Agent UUID. Alternative to computer_name. |

- **`get_agent`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `agent_id` | `string` | — | [get_agent, agent_activities] Agent UUID. Alternative to computer_name. |
  | `computer_name` | `string` | — | [get_agent] Resolve agent by hostname (must be unique). [list_agents] Filter agents whose name contains this. |

- **`list_agents`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `computer_name` | `string` | — | [get_agent] Resolve agent by hostname (must be unique). [list_agents] Filter agents whose name contains this. |
  | `query` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Free-text search across agents. |
  | `os_type` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Filter by OS type. |
  | `infected` | `boolean` | — | [list_agents] Only agents with active threats. |
  | `isolated` | `boolean` | — | [list_agents] Only network-isolated (disconnected) agents. |

- **`list_groups`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | GSageToolConfig profile (S1 console) to use. Omit for the 'default' profile. |
  | `agent_id` | `string` | — | [get_agent, agent_activities] Agent UUID. Alternative to computer_name. |
  | `computer_name` | `string` | — | [get_agent] Resolve agent by hostname (must be unique). [list_agents] Filter agents whose name contains this. |
  | `query` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Free-text search across agents. |
  | `os_type` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Filter by OS type. |
  | `infected` | `boolean` | — | [list_agents] Only agents with active threats. |
  | `isolated` | `boolean` | — | [list_agents] Only network-isolated (disconnected) agents. |
  | `site_ids` | `string` | — | Comma-separated site IDs to scope the query. Defaults to the profile's default_site_ids. |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | Maximum items to return (default 100, hard cap 1000). |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | — | Force CSV artifact even for small results (auto over 100 rows). |
  | `export_json` | `boolean` | — | Persist the full result as a JSON artifact. |

- **`list_sites`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | GSageToolConfig profile (S1 console) to use. Omit for the 'default' profile. |

  | `computer_name` | `string` | — | [get_agent] Resolve agent by hostname (must be unique). [list_agents] Filter agents whose name contains this. |
  | `query` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Free-text search across agents. |
  | `os_type` | `string` | — | [list_agents] Filter by OS type. |
  | `infected` | `boolean` | — | [list_agents] Only agents with active threats. |
